title: Widget card

fields.name: variant
fields.notes: 0 gauge, 1 chart, 2 progress, 3 label, 4 combo; out-of-range is ignored (gauge).

fields.name: value
fields.notes: 0-100; drives the gauge arc / progress bar.

fields.name: value string
fields.notes: Big value line under the body (any unit text).

notes: The C-side `color` field has no renderer arm and stays unwired.
